title: genista humilis
intro: Genista humilis, also known as the dwarf broom or low broom, is a perennial shrub native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of coumarins and other compounds. The health benefits of Genista humilis include its potential to support cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Genista humilis can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as infusions, tinctures, and teas, making it a popular remedy in folk medicine.
